data.title: BNB Chain Launches AI Agent Tools and Funding Program to Accelerate On-Chain AI Development
data.description: Key takeawaysBNB Chain launched native on-chain MCP tools for AI agents.The initiative supports real-time on-chain data access, autonomous transactions, and wallet management.AI agents can register permanent identities using the ERC-8004 standard.BNB Chain is funding the first batch of open-source AI agent skills through an ecosystem acceleration program.BNB Chain Introduces On-Chain AI Agent InfrastructureBNB Chain has launched a new set of native tools designed to accelerate the development of autonomous AI agents on blockchain networks.The new infrastructure includes on-chain MCP tools, allowing AI systems to directly interact with blockchain environments in real time.With these capabilities, developers can transform experimental AI prototypes into production-ready agents capable of executing transactions and transferring value on-chain.Funding Program to Support Open-Source AI Agent DevelopmentAs part of the initiative, BNB Chain is actively supporting the development and open sourcing of the first batch of AI agent skills through funding and ecosystem acceleration programs.The goal is to encourage developers and projects to build autonomous blockchain-native AI applications that can operate directly on decentralized infrastructure.This ecosystem program aims to expand the number of tools available for developers building AI-powered decentralized applications (dApps).Core Capabilities of BNB Chain AI AgentsAI agents built with BNB Chain’s MCP tools gain several key capabilities:1. Real-time blockchain data accessAgents can read any on-chain data or smart contract state instantly, enabling automated decision-making based on live blockchain information.2. Autonomous transactions and wallet managementAI agents can execute transactions and manage digital wallets independently, allowing them to perform financial operations without manual intervention.3. Permanent on-chain identity registrationAgents can register permanent identities using the ERC-8004 standard, giving them verifiable on-chain identities for interaction with other decentralized applications and services.Expanding the AI and Blockchain EcosystemThe launch highlights BNB Chain’s broader push to combine artificial intelligence with decentralized finance and blockchain infrastructure.By enabling autonomous agents with real-time blockchain access and transaction capabilities, the network aims to accelerate innovation in areas such as:decentralized finance automationAI-powered trading agentsautonomous blockchain servicesThe funding and acceleration program is expected to drive the next wave of AI-enabled Web3 applications across the BNB Chain ecosystem.

data.title: CIMG Inc. to Acquire iZUMi Finance's Core Assets for DeFi Expansion
data.description: iZUMi Finance has entered into a strategic agreement with Nasdaq-listed CIMG Inc. According to NS3.AI, CIMG plans to acquire a portion of iZUMi Finance's core assets, patents, and intellectual property. The acquisition is aimed at enhancing CIMG's institutional-grade decentralized finance infrastructure. Additionally, CIMG intends to integrate iZUMi Finance's technology into its existing offerings. The detailed terms of the agreement have not been disclosed.

data.title: Middle East Tensions Rise Amid Recent Attack
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X that recent developments in the Middle East have sparked concerns over stability in the region. The attack, launched with references to Amalek just before Purim, has drawn comparisons to past conflicts in Libya, Iraq, and Syria. Observers are worried that the situation may escalate, leading to further instability similar to previous regional conflicts.

data.title: Bloomberg: The prediction market sector is rapidly emerging, with Polymarket, Kalshi, and Opinion forming a three-way competition.
data.description: According to Bloomberg, prediction markets have experienced rapid growth over the past year, attracting widespread attention, including from traditional financial institutions. Currently, the main platforms in the industry include Polymarket, Kalshi, and Opinion, which are considered to constitute the main competitive landscape. The report points out that as the regulatory environment becomes clearer and trading demand around macro events and trending topics continues to grow, prediction markets are becoming an important new track at the intersection of the crypto industry and traditional finance.

data.title: Bloomberg analysts: Bitcoin ETFs attracted another $500 million in a single day, rising 12% since the Middle East conflict began.
data.description: Eric Balchunas, a senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, wrote on the X platform that Bitcoin ETFs attracted another $500 million in inflows in a single day, with 10 out of 11 US Bitcoin ETFs being particularly popular with investors. Furthermore, since the escalation of the Middle East conflict, Bitcoin has risen by approximately 12%, while gold has declined during the same period. This performance has sparked discussion about the safe-haven attributes of both, as it is relatively rare for Bitcoin to strengthen while gold falls. This has led some investors to reconsider the roles of traditional "safe-haven assets" and "digital gold." Does this mean that gold has failed to play its safe-haven role in the current environment, or conversely, that Bitcoin is gradually assuming some of the functions of a safe-haven asset? However, long-term market disagreements remain. Some analysts believe that gold remains the primary safe-haven asset during traditional crises, while Bitcoin's market performance is often more volatile.

data.title: Zimbabwe Advances in Debt Clearance Talks with Lenders
data.description: Zimbabwe is making progress in its efforts to clear a $23 billion debt owed to multilateral institutions, according to President Emmerson Mnangagwa. Bloomberg posted on X that discussions with lenders are advancing positively. The country is working towards resolving its financial obligations as part of a broader strategy to stabilize its economy and improve international relations. President Mnangagwa emphasized the importance of these negotiations in addressing Zimbabwe's economic challenges and fostering growth.

data.title: U.S. Oil Production Faces Challenges Amid Global Conflict
data.description: The United States, despite being the leading oil producer globally, is not entirely shielded from the impacts of international conflicts. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the ongoing war has significant implications for the U.S. energy sector. The complexities of global oil markets mean that geopolitical tensions can influence domestic production and prices. As the world's top driller, the U.S. still faces vulnerabilities due to its interconnectedness with global supply chains and market dynamics. These challenges underscore the importance of strategic planning and resilience in the energy sector to mitigate potential disruptions.

data.title: Wall Street's Focus on Key Companies Before Market Opening
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting several companies that are capturing Wall Street's attention ahead of the market opening. Broadcom, Ciena, Stubhub, Trade Desk, and Veeva are among the firms being closely watched by investors. Analysts are evaluating these companies' performances and potential impacts on the market. The anticipation surrounding these firms is driven by recent developments and strategic moves that could influence their stock prices. As the market prepares to open, investors are keenly observing any announcements or changes that might affect trading dynamics.

data.title: New Wallet Withdraws 304.55 Bitcoins from Exchange
data.description: A newly created wallet has withdrawn 304.55 bitcoins from an exchange. According to ChainCatcher, the transaction is valued at approximately $22.16 million. This movement of funds has attracted attention in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: EU and GCC Acknowledge Importance of Maritime Defense Operations
data.description: The European Union (EU) and the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) have issued a joint statement recognizing the significance of the EU's 'Aspides' and 'Atalanta' maritime defense operations. According to Jin10, the foreign ministers from both regions have encouraged enhanced coordination to support these initiatives. The statement underscores the collaborative efforts between the EU and GCC in maintaining maritime security and stability. The ministers emphasized the need for continued cooperation to address regional security challenges effectively.

data.title: London Insurance Market Ready to Cover Vessels in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: The London insurance market has expressed its readiness to provide coverage for vessels navigating the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the market's capability and willingness to support maritime operations in this strategically significant waterway. This development comes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions in the region, which have raised concerns about the safety and security of shipping routes. The insurance market's assurance aims to bolster confidence among shipping companies and stakeholders involved in the transit of goods through this critical passage.

data.title: EU and GCC Pledge Joint Efforts to Prevent Iran's Nuclear Weapon Acquisition
data.description:
The European Union (EU) and the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) have issued a joint statement emphasizing their commitment to collaborative diplomatic efforts aimed at preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons. According to Jin10, foreign ministers from both regions have agreed to work together to achieve a lasting solution that addresses the concerns surrounding Iran's nuclear ambitions.

The statement highlights the shared objective of halting the production and proliferation of ballistic missiles by Iran, which has been a point of contention in international relations. The EU and GCC's unified stance underscores the importance of diplomatic engagement in addressing regional security challenges.

This development comes amid ongoing global discussions about Iran's nuclear program and its implications for regional stability. The EU and GCC's commitment to joint diplomatic efforts reflects a broader strategy to ensure peace and security in the region.

data.title: KOSPI Plummets 12% as Bitcoin Reaches New High of $74,000
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). The KOSPI index experienced a significant drop of 12% in a single day, while Bitcoin surged to a new high of $74,000. Over the weekend, the crypto market had already factored in potential risks, with expectations of war-induced inflation benefiting assets with fixed supply. Additionally, Middle Eastern capital is seeking borderless investment opportunities. The ongoing conflict has led to divergent outcomes for the stock market and Bitcoin.

data.title: A whale has opened a long position in silver with 2x leverage, currently valued at approximately $2.5 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale opened a 2x leveraged long position in silver, with a current position value of approximately $2.5 million and a liquidation price of approximately $43.

data.title: OKB briefly broke through 120 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 48.83%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that OKB briefly broke through 120 USDT and is currently trading at 112.98 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 48.83%.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed CIMG plans to acquire iZUMi Finance's core assets.
data.description: iZUMi Finance announced a strategic agreement with Nasdaq-listed CIMG Inc. (Nasdaq: IMG), under which CIMG plans to acquire certain core assets, patents, and intellectual property of iZUMi Finance to further expand its institutional-grade decentralized finance (DeFi) infrastructure footprint. According to the agreement, CIMG plans to integrate iZUMi Finance's multi-chain liquidity technology and governance mechanisms to improve on-chain capital efficiency and optimize the management of its Bitcoin reserves' yield. CIMG also plans to purchase $IZI tokens for long-term staking and governance participation. This acquisition builds on previous collaborations between the two companies, including a joint $20 million Upstarts Fund. By integrating iZUMi's liquidity infrastructure and technology assets, both companies will further strengthen their presence in the on-chain liquidity market and institutional-grade DeFi. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gate.com launched Gate for AI, building an AI trading infrastructure with a "MCP + Skills" two-layer architecture.
data.description: Digital asset trading platform Gate officially launched Gate for AI, introducing a unified AI entry point that integrates five capabilities under a single interface system: CEX, DEX, wallets, real-time news, and on-chain data. Gate for AI employs a two-layer capability structure. In this architecture, MCP provides standardized basic interfaces covering market data, account information, trade execution, and on-chain data querying, enabling AI to quickly access and invoke platform capabilities. Skills, on the other hand, encapsulates higher-level strategy modules such as market scanning, position range assessment, and risk analysis, helping AI make more complex trading decisions. Furthermore, Gate for AI supports multi-platform calls, lowering the barrier to entry and catering to users with diverse needs. This launch marks an upgrade of exchange capabilities from a user interface product to a directly accessible AI infrastructure layer, propelling digital asset trading into the Agent-native era.

data.title: Economic Indicators Released at 8:30 AM: Jobless Claims, Productivity, and More
data.description:
A series of key economic indicators were released at 8:30 AM, providing insights into the current state of the economy. Bespoke Investment Group posted on X. The data includes jobless claims, nonfarm productivity, unit labor costs, and import prices, all of which are crucial for understanding economic trends.

Jobless claims offer a snapshot of the labor market's health, indicating the number of individuals filing for unemployment benefits. Nonfarm productivity measures the efficiency of labor in producing goods and services, while unit labor costs reflect the cost of labor per unit of output. Import prices provide information on the cost of goods purchased from abroad, impacting inflation and consumer prices.

These indicators are closely watched by economists and policymakers as they provide valuable information on economic performance and potential future trends. The data can influence decisions on monetary policy and economic planning, affecting everything from interest rates to government spending.

data.title: AI Tool OpenClaw Faces Security Incident Due to Command Injection
data.description:
On March 5, Web3 security firm GoPlus reported a security incident involving the AI development tool OpenClaw. According to BlockBeats, the issue arose during the execution of automated tasks when the system incorrectly constructed a Bash command while creating a GitHub Issue, leading to a command injection that exposed numerous sensitive environment variables.

The incident involved AI-generated strings containing backticks around 'set', which Bash interpreted as command substitution and executed automatically. As a result, Bash outputted all current environment variables without parameters, leading to over 100 lines of sensitive information, including Telegram keys and authentication tokens, being directly published in a GitHub Issue.

GoPlus recommends using API calls instead of directly concatenating Shell commands in AI automation development or testing scenarios. They also advise adhering to the principle of least privilege to isolate environment variables, disabling high-risk execution modes, and incorporating manual review mechanisms in critical operations.

data.title: GoPlus and Custos Forge Strategic Partnership for Token Locking
data.description:
GoPlus has announced a long-term strategic partnership with Custos. According to ChainCatcher, the collaboration will focus on deepening cooperation in token locking services and exploring new possibilities in on-chain asset management. The aim is to elevate token locking from a basic tool to a protocol-level capital strategy infrastructure.

Both parties will maintain clear boundaries and distinct roles, achieving strategic synergy while independently developing. Custos will concentrate on innovation at the asset management protocol layer, advancing token locking services to a higher level. Meanwhile, GoPlus will continue to build security infrastructure and provide strategic support for Custos's development.
